content.problemStatement:
After you save your unfinished work using git stash, you may want to see what you stored. \
Git gives you simple commands to check your stashes.

---

**Git Commands:**
```sss
git stash list
```
Shows all the stashes you have saved so far.
(Think of it as a list of all your “saved work snapshots.”)

---

**`git stash list` Visualizer**



---

**Note :** 
- There are two more commands that are used to view particular stash :
```sss
git stash show       #Shows a short summary of the latest stash changes
git stash show -p    Shows the full, detailed code changes of the latest stash
```
